hooks.command: jq -e '.tool_input.command | test("^git commit")' > /dev/null 2>&1 && cd /Users/chema/Code/Chemaclass/chemaclass.com && zola check 2>&1 | tail -5 || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */content/*.md|*/static/slides/*.md) if grep -n '—' "$f" >&2; then echo "Em dash (U+2014) is forbidden; replace it (see .claude/rules/no-em-dash.md)" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
